overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a dimly lit interior room with green neon lighting, passing through a pink neon-lit private room, descending concrete stairs, and exiting into a dark urban alleyway with teal and purple neon signage. The player approaches a group of people gathered around a burning barrel in the alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: green-lit interior lounge with scattered items

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit room with green fluorescent lighting, approaching a doorway emitting pink light

entered.detail: long green fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling
circular table with bottles and drug paraphernalia scattered on top
red and white poster attached to a concrete pillar
open doorway emitting bright pink neon light from the adjacent room

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow, green-lit interior room with fluorescent ceiling lights. A round table with scattered items sits in the center while the camera approaches a doorway glowing with pink light at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit private room with platform bed

events.description: passes through doorway into pink neon-lit room with platform bed
exits pink room back into the green-lit corridor

agents.ego_description: entering the pink room, panning to observe the neon decorations, then turning to exit

entered.detail: low platform bed with white mattress illuminated by pink overhead lighting
two red cylindrical pendant lamps hanging from the ceiling
vertical strip of pink LED lights along the door frame
circular rug with zebra stripe pattern under the platform bed
blue neon wall sign shaped like a condom package

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a small room bathed in pink and purple neon light, featuring a platform bed with zebra rug and red hanging lamps. After briefly panning to show a blue neon wall sign, the camera turns and exits back to the green corridor.

events.description: begins descending concrete staircase with metal railings
opens metal exit door revealing outdoor alleyway

agents.ego_description: walking down a concrete stairwell with metal railings, then through corridors with graffiti-covered walls toward an exit

entered.detail: narrow concrete staircase descending between gray walls
silver metal handrail along the right side of the stairs
blue neon sign with abstract bottle-like shape on the stairwell wall
wall covered in white and red graffiti tags and abstract designs
heavy metal door with red light strip above leading outside

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a concrete stairwell illuminated by blue neon signs and graffiti-covered walls, navigating metal railings and corridors before reaching a metal exit door that opens to the outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark urban alley with neon signage and industrial pipes

events.description: exits building into narrow outdoor alleyway with wet asphalt
passes under bright purple neon sign illuminating the alley wall

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark wet alleyway, looking up at the towering buildings and neon signs overhead

entered.detail: tall concrete and metal walls of surrounding buildings forming a narrow canyon
large rectangular purple neon sign with white text mounted on the left wall
network of metal pipes and conduits crossing overhead between buildings
heaps of garbage bags and debris stacked against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a dark, wet urban alleyway flanked by tall building walls and illuminated by purple neon signs. The camera walks forward beneath overhead industrial pipes, passing trash piles as it moves deeper into the alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley courtyard with group gathered around fire

events.description: approaches group of people standing near a burning barrel

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching a group of people gathered around a fire in the alley

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing near a burning barrel, one appears to be warming their hands

entered.detail: three human figures standing together near the firelight
metal barrel with open fire providing orange light and smoke
multi-story building with illuminated windows showing interior lights

segments.scene_description: The alley opens slightly into a small courtyard where a group of three people stand near a burning barrel providing warm orange light. The camera approaches the stationary group as the purple neon signs fade into the background behind the tall building walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, neon-lit interior through a descending concrete stairwell and into a dark, atmospheric urban alleyway. It begins in a narrow room bathed in green fluorescent light, moving toward a doorway that opens into a small private space filled with pink and purple neon hues and red hanging lamps. The camera then turns back to the corridor and descends a concrete stairwell lined with blue neon signs and graffiti before passing through a metal exit door. As the camera emerges outside, the scene shifts to a wet, dark alleyway flanked by tall walls and purple signage, moving beneath industrial pipes and past piles of trash. The journey finally concludes as the alley opens into a small courtyard, where the cool neon tones give way to the warm orange glow of a burning barrel surrounded by a small group of people.
